**ChainCheck** shows live Caltrans chain controls, road closures, CHP incidents, pass forecasts, and resort snow for the Sierra Nevada passes to Lake Tahoe, and sends a push notification the moment a route you watch changes.

## Install on Android

1. On your Android phone, download **`chaincheck.apk`** from **Assets** at the bottom of this page.
2. Open the downloaded file. The first time, Android asks permission to install apps from your browser or Files; allow it, then tap **Install**.
3. Open ChainCheck and choose where you are headed. No account, no sign-up.

Already installed? Open this APK over your current version and your settings are kept. New to ChainCheck? The full [install guide](https://github.com/nicglazkov/chaincheck/blob/main/docs/install.md) has the step-by-step and troubleshooting. Google Play and the App Store arrive in August 2026.
